headline: Radishes bolt in Monday heat — harvest and inspect peas
weather_notes: Monday 80°F / Tuesday 81°F will trigger radish bolting within hours if still in ground — harvest window closes fast.
Heat spike Mon–Tue accelerates aphid reproduction on peas; overdue inspections need to happen today or tomorrow.
Wednesday brings 72% chance of showers and thunderstorms — any Bt applied after Tuesday will wash off before it works.
Warm-dry Mon–Tue into wet-cool Wednesday is the classic trigger pattern for powdery mildew on peas nearing harvest.

surfaced_tasks.title: Harvest radishes before heat triggers bolting
surfaced_tasks.reason: Expected harvest is Apr 20 and Monday's 80°F will bolt them if left in the ground even one more day.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for aphids — apply Bt if caterpillars present
surfaced_tasks.reason: Two days overdue and Monday's heat spike accelerates aphid populations — apply Bt by tomorrow before Wednesday rain washes it off.
